$comment: Layer D for MANIFEST: static data-flow equivalence between the IR and migrated candidate A (OCCURS O3-flat). Each decomposed leaf is one flow region on the legacy side, matched by one parallel array region on the modern side: S1-S3 derive from the sku constants region, E1-E3 and TOTAL from the qty input region with the price constants and half-up rounding, TIER is control flow over the total. Candidate B's per-row collapse is invisible here (same regions) and is layer B's catch, consistent with the coarse-region design.
